case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A. VS. TIMOLIN J FLUGENCE et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 395 (B): VENUE FOR PERSONAL, FAMILY OR HOUSEHOLD OBLIGATIONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FLUGENCE, TIMOLIN J $7,243.60 PRINCIPAL, $1,135.13 INTEREST, $262.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,640.73, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
